reviews.review_title: Worst vr game I have ever tried
reviews.review_description:
Don't waste your time downloading this, the very first second it starts I got motion sickness from me being a like movie camera panning across the beach.
The devs obviously know nothing about making vr games.
There are no options whatsoever not even a menu, in fact when you did a menu to quit, restart or new game comes up THAT DOESN'T EVEN WORK you can't select any of them.

The swim mechanic is nothing like any other swimming game, you basically grab a tiny piece of the air and pull urself, also you can't turn, you literally grab the air to turn when swimming.
And like I said no options so you can only smooth turn which makes me extremely motion sick.
Idk if it says seated play but defo not again no height adjustment or anything.
